creator: sunpoet@sunpoet.net
text:
Hi Jamrich,

Grosan Flaviu Gheorghe, author of dracMail, has submitted a PR (ports/15425=
7).
He would like to maintain this port by himself.
Do you agree to pass maintainership to him?

Regards,
sunpoet
